title: lobelia cardinalis f. splendens
intro: Lobelia cardinalis f. splendens, also known as Cardinal Lobelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include reducing mucus production, alleviating congestion, and easing muscle spasms. Lobelia cardinalis f. splendens is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
